portfolio.heroSubtitle: Projects that transformed businesses and generated real results.
portfolio.confidential: Due to contractual agreements, company names cannot be disclosed.

projects.title: Institutional Website — Law Firm
projects.description: Institutional website for a law firm with practice areas, partner profiles, legal blog and qualified lead generation. Sophisticated design with dark and gold tones conveying credibility and tradition.

projects.title: Institutional Website — Healthcare Network
projects.description: Web platform for a healthcare network with online scheduling, specialty panels, WhatsApp integration and patient portal. Clean and welcoming interface focused on accessibility.

projects.title: Institutional Website — Real Estate Developer
projects.description: Website for a real estate developer with property catalog, virtual tours, financing simulator and per-unit lead capture. Premium design with immersive gallery and CRM integration.

projects.title: Landing Page — B2B SaaS Platform
projects.description: High-conversion landing page for a B2B SaaS platform with interactive product demo, social proof, ROI calculator and optimized acquisition funnel with A/B testing.

projects.title: Landing Page — Corporate Event
projects.description: Landing page for a corporate tech event with countdown, speaker lineup, registration system with ticketing and payment gateway integration. Impactful design with animations and urgency.

projects.title: Mobile App — Internal System, Catalog and More
projects.description: Mobile app for internal operations with product catalog, field inventory control, ticket management and team communication. Offline-first with automatic sync, integrated with existing ERP.

projects.title: Mobile App — Field Sales Team
projects.description: App for external sales teams with visit routing, task checklists, order collection and photo reports. Integrated GPS for presence verification and real-time management dashboard.

projects.title: Financial Management Dashboard
projects.description: Executive dashboard for financial management with real-time KPIs, interactive charts, automatic bank reconciliation and smart alerts. Customizable panels with drill-down by period, unit and cost center.

projects.title: Logistics & Tracking System
projects.description: Routing and tracking platform with real-time maps, fleet management, route deviation alerts and performance reports. Optimization algorithms for cost reduction and improved on-time delivery rates.

about.heroSubtitle: Technology that transforms businesses, with global presence.
storyParagraphs: KORT.X was born from the need to connect businesses with real technology solutions. Not generic tools, but custom systems that solve real problems.
Founded by developers and entrepreneurs with international market experience, KORT.X combines the innovation of the American tech ecosystem with Brazilian creativity and resilience.
Today, with offices in Orlando (FL) and Rio de Janeiro (RJ), we serve companies of all sizes that need technology to truly grow.
nameParagraphs: KORT.X refers to the cerebral cortex, the decision center of the human brain.
The blue square is a neural node: each intelligent connection between data, analysis, decision and action within a company.
Everything starts at KORTEX, and from well-connected ideas, extraordinary solutions are born.
about.missionText: Democratize access to cutting-edge technology, delivering digital solutions that generate real results for companies of all sizes.

values.title: Technical Excellence
values.description: Clean code, solid architecture, deliveries that work.

values.title: Total Transparency
values.description: Clear communication, realistic deadlines, no surprises.

values.title: Results-Driven
values.description: Technology as a means, not an end. What matters is the impact on your business.

values.title: Long-term Partnership
values.description: We don't abandon after delivery. We evolve together.

offices.description: Innovation and technology hub, serving the North American market with cutting-edge solutions.
Development center, connected to the Brazilian tech ecosystem and Latin American market.

contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your project and let's find the best solution together.

aiFirst.heroTitle: What if every process in your company was born intelligent?
aiFirst.heroSubtitle: AI First is the mindset that puts artificial intelligence at the core of business. Not as an add-on, but as the starting point.
aiFirst.problemTraditionalTitle: How most companies use AI today
problemTraditionalItems: AI added to existing processes as a patch.
Isolated tools with no real integration.
problemAIFirstItems: Processes redesigned with AI from the ground up.
Data as the central asset for every decision.
Deep automation with continuous human calibration.
Native integration across systems, channels, and teams.
aiFirst.videoSubtitle: A quick overview of how we apply the AI First mindset in real projects for SMBs.
aiFirst.benefitsSubtitle: AI First is not theory. It's measurable results in day-to-day operations.

benefits.title: Intelligent scalability
benefits.description: Grow without multiplying costs. AI-powered processes scale efficiently, automatically adapting to demand.

benefits.title: Data-driven decisions
benefits.description: Eliminate guesswork. Dashboards and predictive models turn raw data into actionable real-time insights.

benefits.title: Personalized experience
benefits.description: Every customer gets tailored service. AI analyzes behavior and preferences to deliver relevance.

benefits.title: Agility and innovation
benefits.description: Reduce development and testing cycles. Prototypes, MVPs, and iterations guided by artificial intelligence.

benefits.title: Omnichannel integration
benefits.description: Connect every touchpoint, like website, app, WhatsApp, and email, with a unified intelligent layer.

aiFirst.stepsSubtitle: A structured 3-step process to transform your operations.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: We map processes, available data, and automation opportunities. We identify where AI generates the most impact for your business.

steps.title: Restructuring
steps.description: We redesign workflows and systems with AI at the core. We define architecture, integrations, and optimized data models.

steps.title: Implementation + Human calibration
steps.description: We develop, test, and deploy. Humans always calibrate, adjusting parameters, validating results, and continuously refining.

aiFirst.ctaTitle: Want to understand how AI First works for your company?
aiFirst.ctaDescription: Schedule a conversation with our team and discover how to redesign your processes with artificial intelligence at the core.
